{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-ID-GOES-HERE",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (CMDP formulation), shows where the draft drifts from it (lack of explicit equations and constraints), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (suggested restructuring).",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (specific issues), and proposes minimal repairs (suggested restructuring).",
    "R1.4": "Maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta (minor: awkward phrasing in original output).",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (specific issues: undefined terms and loose complexity claim).",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (specific issue: contribution paragraph is out of place).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no factual claims requiring verification).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not (specific issues: no explicit annotation for non-cosmetic changes)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "R1.4": 0.85,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.85,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (CMDP formulation), shows where the draft drifts from it (lack of explicit equations and constraints), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (suggested restructuring).
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (specific issues), and proposes minimal repairs (suggested restructuring).
rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta (minor: awkward phrasing in original output).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (specific issues: undefined terms and loose complexity claim).
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (specific issue: contribution paragraph is out of place).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (no factual claims requiring verification).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not (specific issues: no explicit annotation for non-cosmetic changes).
